certBullets: Hands-on exposure to {internshipDomain} methodologies and core development frameworks.
Configuration and testing of software modules using {programmingLanguages} and {toolsUsed}.
Implementation of technical workflows related to {internshipTopic} under professional mentorship.
Participation in project lifecycle stages, including dataset review and unit testing procedures.
Collaboration with the engineering team to deploy prototype configurations and document outcomes.

dailyActivities.title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
dailyActivities.activity: Analyzed the CIA Triad (Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability) and its application in enterprise risk evaluation and security policy design. Studied modern threat vectors, adversarial motives, and security mitigation strategies.

dailyActivities.title: Vulnerability Assessment
dailyActivities.activity: Explored corporate attack surfaces and threat vectors. Studied the Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) framework to calculate severity and formulate structured remediation strategies.

dailyActivities.title: OWASP Top 10 Analysis
dailyActivities.activity: Reviewed the ten most critical web application security risks. Conducted hands-on sandboxed labs focusing on SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), and insecure deserialization attacks.

dailyActivities.title: Networking Fundamentals
dailyActivities.activity: Analyzed the TCP/IP and OSI model architectures. Evaluated header structures, handshake protocols, and the specific security configurations required at each network layer.

dailyActivities.title: IP Addressing & Subnetting
dailyActivities.activity: Practiced network segmentation using CIDR notation. Analyzed how custom subnetting minimizes broadcast domains, restricts lateral movement, and reduces the network attack surface.

dailyActivities.title: DNS & Domain Architecture
dailyActivities.activity: Audited DNS resolver protocols, query workflows, and zone transfers. Investigated DNS cache poisoning, spoofing, and standard defensive configurations like DNSSEC.

dailyActivities.title: HTTP/S & TLS Security
dailyActivities.activity: Explored transport-layer encryption configurations. Analyzed the TLS 1.3 cryptographic handshake mechanism, session key exchange, and X.509 certificate validation rules.

dailyActivities.title: DNS Enumeration Reconnaissance
dailyActivities.activity: Conducted active and passive network reconnaissance within local sandboxes. Utilized Nslookup, Dig, and Traceroute to map domain infrastructure and document diagnostic records.

dailyActivities.title: Python Scripting Refresher
dailyActivities.activity: Revised Python programming structures, focus on file I/O operations, error logs parsing, exception handling, and custom libraries implementation for security tasks.

dailyActivities.title: Security Automation Scripts
dailyActivities.activity: Developed custom Python automation scripts to calculate SHA-256 hashes of system binaries, validating file integrity against baseline manifests to detect unauthorized changes.

dailyActivities.title: Log Auditing & Regular Expressions
dailyActivities.activity: Implemented Regular Expression patterns in Python scripts to audit system auth logs. Extracted specific event fields, timestamps, and flagged failed authentication patterns.

dailyActivities.title: Active Service Reconnaissance
dailyActivities.activity: Wrote Python scripts for banner grabbing and service version scanning. Handled socket connections to discover running service details and flag vulnerable versions.

dailyActivities.title: Traffic Baseline Profiling
dailyActivities.activity: Studied network traffic profiling, baseline metrics collection, and anomaly detection principles. Formulated rules for identifying traffic deviation anomalies.

dailyActivities.title: SSH Automation Security
dailyActivities.activity: Developed secure Python scripts using Paramiko to automate SSH administrative commands, enforce key-based authentication, and audit configuration directories.

dailyActivities.title: Wireshark Packet Auditing
dailyActivities.activity: Captured live loopback traffic in sandboxed environments. Used Wireshark filters to isolate anomalous TCP handshakes, payload signatures, and extract indicators of compromise.

dailyActivities.title: Web Assessment Lab
dailyActivities.activity: Conducted authorized vulnerability assessments on a sandboxed target. Documented cross-site scripting risks and formulated input sanitization remediation steps.

dailyActivities.title: Keylogger: Requirements
dailyActivities.activity: Defined system requirements, data flow specifications, and strict ethical boundaries for the keylogger awareness tool. Designed the keyboard event listener architecture.

dailyActivities.title: Keylogger: Environment Setup
dailyActivities.activity: Configured the local Python virtual environment. Implemented the keyboard event listener module using the pynput library to intercept keystroke inputs.

dailyActivities.title: Keylogger: Monitoring Core
dailyActivities.activity: Developed the core keystroke capture engine. Configured background listener threads to process and store intercepted key events into an active memory buffer.

dailyActivities.title: Keylogger: Regex Engine
dailyActivities.activity: Developed and integrated a multi-pattern Regular Expression matching engine to scan the keystroke buffer in real-time, successfully flagging passwords, email addresses, and OTP structures.

dailyActivities.title: Keylogger: Database Storage
dailyActivities.activity: Integrated SQLite for local storage. Created secure tables to store timestamped alerts of sensitive data logs, applying parameterized queries to prevent database injection.

dailyActivities.title: Keylogger: Dashboard UI
dailyActivities.activity: Created a graphical dashboard using Tkinter. Displayed real-time statistics, cumulative logs, and alert panels highlighting detected sensitive data leakage.

dailyActivities.title: Keylogger: Testing & Validation
dailyActivities.activity: Validated detection accuracy across multiple typing patterns. Audited the keystroke capture latency, resolved SQLite locking exceptions, and finalized documentation.

dailyActivities.title: IDS: Dataset Exploration
dailyActivities.activity: Studied machine learning intrusion detection concepts. Completed exploratory data analysis on the NSL-KDD benchmark dataset, verifying class labels and attribute distributions.

dailyActivities.title: IDS: Model Architectures
dailyActivities.activity: Normalized features using Min-Max scaling and balanced minority attack classes using SMOTE. Implemented spatial CNN and temporal LSTM models in TensorFlow.

dailyActivities.title: IDS: Performance Evaluation
dailyActivities.activity: Evaluated model performance using Confusion Matrix, ROC-AUC, precision, and recall metrics. Generated model interpretability visual reports using SHAP and LIME frameworks.

references: 1. Author Name, Book Title, Publisher, Year.
